description:
What: The uniform return path (writes to frame slot 1, returns frame pointer) stays alive for any-typed specs. Dst specs go through C2 and never use it — remove the dead branch in their codegen.

CLIF impact: compiler-side reduction. Runtime CLIF for Dst specs is set by C2.

Removes: one conditional branch in emit_terminator for Dst specs.

Tests: existing tests pass; assert any-typed specs still use uniform path.

comments.text: subsumed by fz-q9g.3 (CD-bundle): emit_return cleanup is natural completion of Term::Return

title: fz-dps.E2: drop uniform emit_return() for Dst specs
